description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a dark, multi-faceted hip roof and light-colored exterior walls. The front includes a driveway leading to a double garage, surrounded by manicured grass and shrubbery. The backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence and contains a lush garden with several tall palm trees, a swimming pool, and a wooden deck. The landscaping is dense, with a mix of tropical and deciduous trees providing privacy and shade. Windows are distributed along the front and sides, with a modern, clean-lined appearance. The overall design is contemporary, blending natural elements with functional residential features.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, light walls, double garage, lush landscaping, and a backyard pool with palm trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double garage, main entrance, and manicured front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden backyard fence, pool, deck, and dense palm tree landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by tall palm trees, wooden fencing, and partial visibility of the pool and deck.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side of the house, backyard garden, and the transition between the front and rear landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
